name: plugin_info
summary: Returns detailed manifest information for a plugin or library.
documentation:
Returns detailed manifest information for a plugin or library.

## Behavior
Loads a full manifest for one installed plugin or library.
Use kind=plugin to inspect workspace/plugins and kind=library to inspect workspace/libs; kind defaults to plugin.

## Input Schema
Type: object
Required: name
Properties:
- name: string
- kind: string; one of plugin, library

## Output Schema
Type: object
Required: none
Properties: none declared.

## Dependencies
Libraries: plugin_runtime
Requirements: none
Tags: catalog, inspection
